Testimonials.heading: Trusted by thousands across Africa & Europe
Testimonials.description: From individual senders to large enterprises — hear why they choose BITA Express.
Testimonials.testimonial1Quote: BITA Express is a game-changer for my online store. My customers in Germany receive their orders in under 4 days. The real-time tracking keeps everyone calm.
Testimonials.testimonial2Quote: We ship critical machine parts regularly. BITA's premium service has never missed a deadline. Their customs handling is flawless — saves us days of paperwork.
Testimonials.testimonial3Quote: Sending packages to family back home used to be stressful. With BITA I can book, pay, and track everything from my phone. The delivery photo was the cherry on top.
Testimonials.testimonial4Quote: I export traditional textiles to the US and UK. BITA's pricing is the most competitive I've found, and their documentation support helped me get export clearance on the first try.
Testimonials.testimonial5Quote: We use BITA for inter-city document delivery across all our regional offices. Reliable, fast, and the digital receipts integrate perfectly with our expense system.

SupportCTA.problemDesc: File a claim, report damage. Average resolution: 48 hours.

Footer.tagline: International shipping from Ethiopia to the world.

Policies.legallyDesc: By using BITA Express services, you agree to the terms and conditions outlined in this document.
Policies.termsP1: By accessing and using BITA Express, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations.
Policies.termsP2: BITA Express provides international shipping and logistics services. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue any service with or without notice.
Policies.termsP3: Users are responsible for providing accurate shipment information and complying with international trade laws.
Policies.termsP4: BITA Express is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our services.
Policies.termsP5: These terms are governed by the laws of Ethiopia. Any disputes shall be resolved in the competent courts of Addis Ababa.
Policies.privacyP1: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as your name, email, and shipment details, to provide our services.
Policies.privacyP2: Your data is used to process shipments, communicate updates, and improve our logistics platform.
Policies.privacyP3: We share data with partner carriers and customs authorities only as necessary to fulfill your shipping requests.
Policies.privacyP4: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access.
Policies.privacyP5: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. Contact our support team for any privacy concerns.
Policies.carrierP1: Our carriers must adhere to strict safety and reliability standards to ensure the integrity of every shipment.
Policies.carrierP2: Estimated transit times are provided as guidelines and may be affected by customs clearance or weather conditions.
Policies.carrierP3: Shipments may be eligible for insurance. Claims for loss or damage must be filed within 30 days of the expected delivery date.
Policies.carrierP4: Items must be properly packaged according to our guidelines. BITA Express is not liable for damage due to inadequate packaging.
Policies.carrierP5: Carriers are prohibited from transporting hazardous materials, illegal substances, or items outlined in our Restricted Items list.

AboutPage.heroSubtitle: Since our founding, BITA Express has been dedicated to making international shipping accessible, reliable, and transparent for everyone in Ethiopia.
AboutPage.whoDesc1: BITA Express is a full-service logistics company headquartered in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia. We specialize in international parcel delivery, freight forwarding, and e-commerce fulfillment — connecting Ethiopian businesses and individuals to over 200 destinations worldwide.
AboutPage.whoDesc2: Whether you're a small business shipping your first order abroad or a large enterprise managing complex supply chains, we provide the infrastructure, technology, and personal support to make it seamless.
AboutPage.missionDesc: To democratize international shipping for Ethiopia by providing affordable, transparent, and reliable logistics services that empower businesses of all sizes to compete globally. We believe every Ethiopian entrepreneur deserves access to world-class shipping infrastructure.
AboutPage.visionDesc: To become Africa's most trusted logistics platform, known for innovation, speed, and unwavering commitment to customer success. We envision a future where distance is never a barrier to trade, connection, or opportunity for the African continent.
AboutPage.processSubtitle: From pickup to delivery, we handle every step so you can focus on what matters most.
AboutPage.step1Desc: Schedule online or by phone. We collect from your door anywhere in Addis Ababa.
AboutPage.step2Desc: Weigh, label, and sort at our central hub. Full documentation and customs preparation.
AboutPage.step3Desc: Air or sea freight via partner airlines. Live tracking at every checkpoint worldwide.
AboutPage.step4Desc: Licensed brokers handle all documentation, duties, and regulatory compliance.
AboutPage.step5Desc: Door-to-door delivery with proof of delivery, SMS alerts, and signature capture.
AboutPage.servExpressDesc: Door-to-door express delivery to 200+ countries with real-time tracking and customs clearance included.
AboutPage.servFreightDesc: Air and sea freight solutions for businesses moving large volumes, with competitive rates and dedicated support.
AboutPage.servEcomDesc: API integration with Shopify, WooCommerce, and custom stores. Auto-label generation and bulk processing.
AboutPage.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of businesses and individuals who trust BITA Express with their international shipments.
AboutPage.reviewPlaceholder: Share your experience with BITA Express...

SupportPage.heading: We're here to help.
SupportPage.description: Got a question, issue, or just need guidance? Our support team is available to assist you every step of the way.
SupportPage.subject: Subject
SupportPage.stillNeedDesc: Our team is available Monday through Saturday, 8AM to 6PM CAT. We typically respond within a few hours.
SupportPage.messageSent: Message sent! We'll respond within 24 hours.
SupportPage.issueReported: Issue reported! Check your email for updates.
SupportPage.faq1Q: How do I track my shipment?
SupportPage.faq1A: Enter your tracking number (e.g., BITA-987654321) in the Track Shipment field on our homepage. You'll see real-time status updates, a full timeline, and a live map showing your package's location.
SupportPage.faq2Q: What items are restricted or prohibited?
SupportPage.faq2A: Explosives, flammable liquids, toxic substances, radioactive material, live animals, counterfeit goods, and narcotics cannot be shipped. Items like lithium batteries, alcohol, perfume, and electronics can be shipped with restrictions. Check our Restricted Items page for the full list.
SupportPage.faq3Q: How long does international shipping take?
SupportPage.faq3A: Express delivery takes 1-5 business days depending on the destination. Economy shipping takes 5-10 business days. Same-day delivery is available within the Addis Ababa metro area.
SupportPage.faq4Q: What documents do I need to ship internationally?
SupportPage.faq4A: Required documents vary by shipment type. For documents: a completed waybill and valid ID. For commercial goods: commercial invoice, packing list, export license (if required), and certificate of origin. For personal effects: packing list, passport copy, and visa/residence permit.
SupportPage.faq5Q: How do I file a claim for a lost or damaged package?
SupportPage.faq5A: You can file a claim through our Support page or by calling +251 11 123 4567. You'll need your tracking number, a description of the issue, and photos if the package is damaged. Average resolution time is 48 hours.
SupportPage.faq6A: Yes! You can schedule a pickup from the homepage. We'll come to your door in Addis Ababa. Select your preferred date and time window, and our driver will arrive at your location.
SupportPage.faq7Q: What payment methods do you accept?
SupportPage.faq7A: We accept telebirr, CBE Birr, Awash Bank, cash at our branches, and all major credit/debit cards. Business customers can also set up monthly invoicing.
SupportPage.faq8A: Yes! We integrate with Shopify, WooCommerce, and custom platforms via our API. Features include auto-fulfillment, bulk label generation, and real-time tracking updates for your customers.
